docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAR-22-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ENTERED FEB-19-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYCE AND BRI INC DBA CASTLE COIN LAUNDRY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 DEXTER T-600 40 LB. WASHERS; 2 DEXTER T-600 BASE; 1 WASCO 184 BASE; 1 HAMILTON ETC., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $9,893.62 DAMAGES, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,369.62, INTEREST $ 243.90 TOTAL $ 11,613.52 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
